positive: A stylized geometric fox silhouette sitting upright in a meditative pose, surrounded by abstract repeating crystalline floral patterns and celestial orbs. The style is modern kawaii abstract with Art Nouveau fluidity. Strong negative space contrasting the warm orange and deep sapphire blue of the fox against a clean, bright, minimalist white background. Use clean, bold lines and vibrant, flat colors suitable for apparel screen printing. Composition must be perfectly centered, highly detailed but scalable, and evoke whimsy and elegance. Trending on ArtStation, clean vectors, pop art poster design.
